title: サウジアラビアRCの後に・破竹之勢

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf blows the competition away and
takes first place. Her performance bodes well for
the Satsuki Sho, although it seems to have
intimidated the general manager.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Symboli Rudolf encounters
Maruzensky, the "Beast." Much like Rudolf,
Maruzensky's formidable skills have made her the
talk of the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Could this potential rivalry bring out a new side
of Symboli Rudolf? I can't help but wonder what
the future might hold.
